creator: bsdpr@phoe.frmug.org
text:
(In reply to Freddy DISSAUX from comment #1)
Thank you Freddy, your comment is helpful. I've obviously missed that part of the manual page. Since I use an in-house-made pre-processor to build ipfw rulesets, I've now provided an interface to lookup for port numbers, service names are no longer submitted to ipfw.
